mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collections (user_id, name, description, is_public, cover_url) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{description}, COALESCE(#{isPublic}, 1), #{coverUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.title, p.cover_url AS coverUrl, p.type, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.collect_count AS collectCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.avatar_url AS avatarUrl FROM collection_posts cp JOIN posts p ON cp.post_id = p.id JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE cp.collection_id = #{collectionId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY cp.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM collection_posts cp JOIN posts p ON cp.post_id = p.id WHERE cp.collection_id = #{collectionId} AND p.status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE collections SET post_count = post_count + 1 WHERE id = #{collectionId}
UPDATE collections SET post_count = post_count - 1 WHERE id = #{collectionId}
